raw_inputs.deck_text: Petra Carbon is building low-cost enhanced-weathering hardware for smallholder farms to sequester carbon while improving soil yield. I've spent the last two years writing publicly about carbon removal MRV standards and building a community following around the technical challenges of distributed sequestration. This is my first company. I have not raised outside funding, have no GitHub-visible codebase (our early prototypes are hardware, not software), and have not been through an accelerator program. We have a working bench prototype and letters of interest from two agricultural cooperatives.
